title: erythroxylum tortuosum
intro: Erythroxylum tortuosum, also known as the tortuous coca plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and act as a mild stimulant, similar to the more well-known Coca plant (Erythroxylum coca). The health benefits of Erythroxylum tortuosum include its potential to alleviate fatigue, improve mental clarity, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements.
